metadata.description: vilib VI to Python mapping (runtime version)

SystemDirectoryType.description: System directory type for Get System Directory.vi

Utility/sysdir.llb/Get System Directory..name: Get System Directory
Utility/sysdir.llb/Get System Directory..python_impl:
from enum import IntEnum
from typing import NamedTuple

class SystemDirectoryType(IntEnum):
    """System directory type enumeration."""
    USER_HOME = 0  # User's home directory
    USER_DESKTOP = 1  # User's desktop
    USER_DOCUMENTS = 2  # User's documents folder
    USER_APP_DATA = 3  # User application data (roaming)
    USER_PREFERENCES = 4  # User preferences
    USER_TEMP = 5  # User temporary files
    PUBLIC_DOCUMENTS = 6  # Public documents
    PUBLIC_APP_DATA = 7  # Public application data
    PUBLIC_PREFERENCES = 8  # Public preferences
    SYSTEM_CORE_LIBS = 9  # System core libraries
    SYSTEM_INSTALLED_LIBS = 10  # System installed libraries
    APPLICATION_FILES = 11  # Application files
    BOOT_VOLUME_ROOT = 12  # Boot volume root
    PUBLIC_CACHE = 13  # Public cache

class GetSystemDirectoryResult(NamedTuple):
    """Result of get_system_directory."""
    system_directory_path: Path  # The resolved system directory path

def get_system_directory(directory_type: SystemDirectoryType) -> GetSystemDirectoryResult:
    """Get the system directory path.
    
    Args:
        directory_type: The type of system directory to retrieve.
    
    Returns:
        GetSystemDirectoryResult with the resolved path.
    """
    paths = {
        SystemDirectoryType.USER_HOME: Path.home(),
        SystemDirectoryType.USER_DESKTOP: Path.home() / 'Desktop',
        SystemDirectoryType.USER_DOCUMENTS: Path.home() / 'Documents',
        SystemDirectoryType.USER_APP_DATA: Path(os.environ.get('APPDATA', Path.home() / '.config')),
        SystemDirectoryType.USER_PREFERENCES: Path(os.environ.get('APPDATA', Path.home() / '.config')),
        SystemDirectoryType.USER_TEMP: Path(os.environ.get('TEMP', '/tmp')),
        SystemDirectoryType.PUBLIC_DOCUMENTS: Path(os.environ.get('PUBLIC', '/usr/share')) / 'Documents',
        SystemDirectoryType.PUBLIC_APP_DATA: Path(os.environ.get('PROGRAMDATA', '/usr/local/share')),
        SystemDirectoryType.PUBLIC_PREFERENCES: Path(os.environ.get('PROGRAMDATA', '/etc')),
        SystemDirectoryType.SYSTEM_CORE_LIBS: Path(os.environ.get('SYSTEMROOT', '/usr')) / 'System32' if os.name == 'nt' else Path('/usr/lib'),
        SystemDirectoryType.SYSTEM_INSTALLED_LIBS: Path(os.environ.get('PROGRAMFILES', '/usr/local/lib')),
        SystemDirectoryType.APPLICATION_FILES: Path(os.environ.get('PROGRAMFILES', '/opt')),
        SystemDirectoryType.BOOT_VOLUME_ROOT: Path(os.environ.get('SYSTEMDRIVE', '/')),
        SystemDirectoryType.PUBLIC_CACHE: Path(os.environ.get('PROGRAMDATA', '/var/cache')),
    }
    return GetSystemDirectoryResult(system_directory_path=paths.get(directory_type, Path.home()))
